item.title: A Young Mother's Disappearance Hid A Chilling Truth
item.description: Kelsey Berreth vanished shortly after Thanksgiving in 2018, prompting a search that quickly drew national attention. Investigators later uncovered a carefully concealed plot involving people close to her, leading to convictions and long prison sentences.

media:content.media:title: A Young Mother's Disappearance Hid A Chilling Truth
media:content.media:description: Kelsey Berreth vanished shortly after Thanksgiving in 2018, prompting a search that quickly drew national attention. Investigators later uncovered a carefully concealed plot involving people close to her, leading to convictions and long prison sentences.

item.title: A Hollywood Star's Death Still Raises Questions Today
item.description: Natalie Wood was found dead in the waters off Catalina Island during a weekend yacht trip with her husband and friends. More than four decades later, conflicting accounts, unanswered questions, and an investigation that was later reopened continue to fuel debate about what really happened that night.

media:content.media:title: A Hollywood Star's Death Still Raises Questions Today
media:content.media:description: Natalie Wood was found dead in the waters off Catalina Island during a weekend yacht trip with her husband and friends. More than four decades later, conflicting accounts, unanswered questions, and an investigation that was later reopened continue to fuel debate about what really happened that night.

item.title: A Late Night Meeting Ended In A Lasting Mystery
item.description: Heather Elvis disappeared after receiving calls connected to a former romantic partner and his wife. While convictions were later secured in connection with her disappearance, Heather has never been found, leaving one of South Carolina's most enduring mysteries unresolved.

media:content.media:title: A Late Night Meeting Ended In A Lasting Mystery
media:content.media:description: Heather Elvis disappeared after receiving calls connected to a former romantic partner and his wife. While convictions were later secured in connection with her disappearance, Heather has never been found, leaving one of South Carolina's most enduring mysteries unresolved.

item.title: A Beloved School Librarian Went Boating And Never Returned
item.description: Patrick Mullins disappeared after taking his boat out on a Florida river in 2013. Days later, his body was found under highly unusual circumstances, and the mystery surrounding his death continues to spark debate more than a decade later.

media:content.media:title: A Beloved School Librarian Went Boating And Never Returned
media:content.media:description: Patrick Mullins disappeared after taking his boat out on a Florida river in 2013. Days later, his body was found under highly unusual circumstances, and the mystery surrounding his death continues to spark debate more than a decade later.

item.title: A Five Year Old Vanished And The Answers Never Came
item.description: Haleigh Cummings disappeared from her Florida home in 2009 while under the care of her father's girlfriend. Despite years of searches, investigations, and intense media attention, her disappearance remains one of America's most enduring unsolved mysteries.

media:content.media:title: A Five Year Old Vanished And The Answers Never Came
media:content.media:description: Haleigh Cummings disappeared from her Florida home in 2009 while under the care of her father's girlfriend. Despite years of searches, investigations, and intense media attention, her disappearance remains one of America's most enduring unsolved mysteries.

item.title: She Was Released From Jail And Vanished Into The Night
item.description: Mitrice Richardson was released from a California jail in the middle of the night and disappeared shortly afterward. Her remains were later discovered in a remote area, but questions about her final hours and the actions of authorities continue to fuel debate years later.

media:content.media:title: She Was Released From Jail And Vanished Into The Night
media:content.media:description: Mitrice Richardson was released from a California jail in the middle of the night and disappeared shortly afterward. Her remains were later discovered in a remote area, but questions about her final hours and the actions of authorities continue to fuel debate years later.

item.title: He Faked His Own Death And Disappeared For Years
item.description: John Darwin was believed to have died in a canoeing accident off the coast of England, but years later he walked into a police station alive. The bizarre case uncovered an elaborate fraud that fooled family, authorities, and the public for nearly five years.

media:content.media:title: He Faked His Own Death And Disappeared For Years
media:content.media:description: John Darwin was believed to have died in a canoeing accident off the coast of England, but years later he walked into a police station alive. The bizarre case uncovered an elaborate fraud that fooled family, authorities, and the public for nearly five years.

item.title: She Left A Bar With Three Men And Never Returned
item.description: Savannah Spurlock, a 22 year old mother of four, disappeared after leaving a Kentucky bar with three men she had just met. Months later, investigators discovered her remains, turning a missing persons case into a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

media:content.media:title: She Left A Bar With Three Men And Never Returned
media:content.media:description: Savannah Spurlock, a 22 year old mother of four, disappeared after leaving a Kentucky bar with three men she had just met. Months later, investigators discovered her remains, turning a missing persons case into a heartbreaking homicide investigation.

item.title: This Beautiful Child Deserved So Much Better
item.description: 22 month old Cooper Harris died after spending hours inside a hot vehicle in Georgia, leading to one of the most controversial and widely debated criminal cases in recent memory. Years later, questions about what happened that day continue to divide public opinion.

media:content.media:title: This Beautiful Child Deserved So Much Better
media:content.media:description: 22 month old Cooper Harris died after spending hours inside a hot vehicle in Georgia, leading to one of the most controversial and widely debated criminal cases in recent memory. Years later, questions about what happened that day continue to divide public opinion.
